summary: FAIL-009 update: increment pipeline-canonical auto-regen counter 2→3 (today's 1fd2aef at 2026-04-24T07:12:42Z) AND refresh outcome text to reflect 7-DAY manual-commit drought threshold crossing (substantive pre-locked milestone). Combined into one issue-proposal to avoid per-12h churn.
detail: Today's chg-20260424-1553-001 reports two new milestones in the PRED-105 silent-ignore pattern: (a) 7-DAY manual-commit drought threshold crossed (prior poll flagged 6-day crossing + 7-day imminent; both now behind us at 7.16d), (b) today's 07:12:42Z ECM Daily Review auto-regen (1fd2aef) held registry_ratio_pct=94.5 / confirmed=69 / prospective=10 / refined=4 unchanged, making this the THIRD consecutive pipeline-canonical auto-regen. Both are exact applications of the counter/threshold mechanism the prior-run analyst designed into FAIL-009; no new analysis is required. Two targeted_substring_replacement patches proposed below.

patches.old: Silent-ignore is PIPELINE-CANONICAL. ECM Daily Review auto-regens on 2026-04-22T07:06:28Z (a149edf) and 2026-04-23T07:09:39Z (c07c38f) both held registry_ratio_pct=94.5 with confirmed=69 / prospective=10 / refined=4 unchanged, without treating the expired-but-unadjudicated PRED-105 window as a refinement. build_daily_review.py logic keys off explicit FALSIFIED labels and has no concept of window-expired-without-adjudication. The exclusion survives each auto-regen tick; the author still has the refined bucket available and has not used it. (Consecutive pipeline-canonical auto-regens: 2 as of 2026-04-23T07:09Z; this counter increments with each future auto-regen that continues to hold the same counts.)
patches.new: Silent-ignore is PIPELINE-CANONICAL. ECM Daily Review auto-regens on 2026-04-22T07:06:28Z (a149edf), 2026-04-23T07:09:39Z (c07c38f), and 2026-04-24T07:12:42Z (1fd2aef) all held registry_ratio_pct=94.5 with confirmed=69 / prospective=10 / refined=4 unchanged, without treating the expired-but-unadjudicated PRED-105 window as a refinement. build_daily_review.py logic keys off explicit FALSIFIED labels and has no concept of window-expired-without-adjudication. The exclusion survives each auto-regen tick; the author still has the refined bucket available and has not used it. (Consecutive pipeline-canonical auto-regens: 3 as of 2026-04-24T07:12:42Z; this counter increments with each future auto-regen that continues to hold the same counts.)
patches.rationale: Counter increments from 2 to 3 consecutive pipeline-canonical auto-regens, adding today's 1fd2aef commit to the list. This is the exact update mechanism the prior-run handoff designed ("this counter increments with each future auto-regen that continues to hold the same counts"). No prose restructure.

patches.old: Window closed 2026-04-18. Dome site still shows PENDING-PROSPECTIVE ~118h (4.92d) later with no PASS/FAIL/REFINED label. Silent-ignore pattern: no verdict issued, no denominator change, no goalpost-move, no new WIN. Silent-ignore now across 8 consecutive polls; predictions.html byte-identical across the most recent 7 polls (md5 885cd58727130018764b14355b0aa785). Author manual-commit drought has crossed the 5-day threshold (last manual commit a57e731 at 2026-04-17T12:02:38Z is ~130h / 5.42d old).
patches.new: Window closed 2026-04-18. Dome site still shows PENDING-PROSPECTIVE ~159.9h (6.66d) later with no PASS/FAIL/REFINED label. Silent-ignore pattern: no verdict issued, no denominator change, no goalpost-move, no new WIN. Silent-ignore now across 10 consecutive polls; predictions.html byte-identical across the most recent 9 polls (md5 885cd58727130018764b14355b0aa785, unchanged since 2026-04-20T14:29:27Z). Author manual-commit drought has crossed the 7-DAY threshold (last manual commit a57e731 at 2026-04-17T12:02:38Z is ~171.8h / 7.16d old; 11 consecutive polls of auto-only commits). Pre-locked rubric: 7-day threshold CROSSING is SUBSTANTIVE; the next manual commit (threshold BREAKING) would be CRITICAL and trigger canary+parameter diff analyst action.
patches.rationale: Numerical state refresh (118h→160h, 8 polls→10, 7 byte-identical→9, 5.42d drought→7.16d drought) combined with a pre-locked-rubric note that the 7-day threshold has been CROSSED (substantive, not critical; critical would require threshold-BREAKING = first manual commit after drought). Prior-run handoff deferred the next outcome refresh to "eventual PRED-105 adjudication, or with drought-break (whichever comes first)"; neither has occurred, but the 7-day-threshold-crossed milestone did not exist at prior refresh time and justifies the combined refresh.

do_not: Do NOT file a separate proposal for each patch — these are tightly coupled and must be applied together.
Do NOT create a new ISS — ISS-1423 already captures the underlying pattern. Apply patches under ISS-1423 or the decider's chosen existing issue, and close.
Do NOT reconcile FAIL-009 — reconciled_at 2026-04-20 stands. These are incremental additive edits, not a re-reconciliation.
Do NOT update the algorithmic_dimension prose restructure — only the counter value (2→3), the list of auto-regens (add 1fd2aef), and the "as of" timestamp should change.
counter_considerations: Risk of analyst-loop appearance: this is the 3rd FAIL-009 refresh in ~72h. Mitigation: single atomic issue-proposal with both patches, tightly scoped; do not expect further FAIL-009 refreshes until either (a) drought-break (threshold-BREAKING = CRITICAL, canary+parameter-diff required) or (b) dome adjudicates PRED-105 or (c) another pre-locked threshold fires (refined count 4→5, goalpost-move, WIN-070). Newsworthy flag remains deferred — 3rd auto-regen and 7-day-crossed are still jargon for non-specialists.
